abilities.shortEffect: Protects friendly Grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.
abilities.effect: Protects friendly Grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.

abilities.shortEffect: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.
abilities.effect: Passes the bearer's held item to an ally when the ally uses up its item.
